name: Honey Dijon-Style Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender container.
2. Cover and process for about 2 minutes or until the seeds are ground.
3. Transfer the mixture to a clean jar.
4. Store, covered, in the refrigerator for up to two weeks to allow flavors to mellow.
5. Use within one year.
6. Stir into vinaigrettes.
